description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On June 12, 2025 at 7:19 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a collision 
involving a pickup truck on Toland Street near Galvez Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southwestbound on Toland Street.. As the Waymo AV proceeded past aheavy truck parked on the righthand 
curb, a pickup truck traveling southeastbound in an alley by 150 Toland Street entered Toland Street in front of the heavy truck and into the 
Waymo AV’s lane of travel. The front driver side of the pickup truck made contact with the front passenger side of the Waymo AV. At the 
time of the impact, the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
